productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Black Handbag
description: Add a twist to your attire by carrying along this fasionable bag from united colors of benetton. Stuff your essentials in and you're ready to hit the mall in style! Length: 50cm Width: 39cm Height: 17cm Made of 100% polyurethane with 100% polyester lining Single zipper with branded metal holder Two sub chambers inside with a zipper closure Two concealed pockets on the outside lined with frills Frills on the outside for added volume to the bag Care Do not wash, bleach, iron, dry clean or tumble dry Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
